description: At the detention facility, Ivanov continues to torture Mace. Ivanov expresses his views on strength and dismisses Mace's ideals of heroism, while Mace defiantly stands by Coulson and S.H.I.E.L.D. Ivanov admires Mace's honesty but reveals he sees Mace as a pawn, making clear his intention to cause further suffering.
location: Krasnoyarsk Krai detention facility / former Soviet submarine bay

transcript.line: I let you sweat a little. But I didn't want to make you wait around forever.
